name: Sunflower Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Sunflower Pharmaceutical Group Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells Chinese pharmaceuticals in China. The company produces Chinese patent medicines, chemicals, biological medicines, and health care medicines. Its products include children's medicines, digestive medicines, flu medicines, gynecologic medicines, liver and gallbladder gastrointestinal medicines, cold medicines, rheumatic medicines, heart and brain vascular medicines, geriatrics and chronic disease medicines, cardiovascular medicines, etc. under the Sun Flower and Little Sun Flower brands. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Harbin, China.
